svg.text: General channel lifespan leaf collision probability
Poisson arrival model with one new storage key per minute on average.
P(collision by day t) = 1 - exp(-mu) * (1 + mu / 2^d)^(2^d), where mu = 1440t.
Probability of at least one leaf collision by that time
This is a general channel-lifespan model for finite leaf projection, not a DApp-specific note/nullifier model.
